projects.name: Disha Central Park
projects.tagline: A monumental community above Varthur Lake
projects.description: A monumental community of 300+ high-end luxury apartments spread over 3.55 acres near Varthur Lake in Bengaluru. Designed by Ambient Associates, Disha Central Park devotes 70% of its expanse to open space and pleasant landscaping, alive with the romance of a luxury resort.

faqs.q: Where is Disha Central Park located?
faqs.a: The community sits over 3.55 acres near Varthur Lake in Panathur, Bengaluru, within easy reach of the ORR IT corridor.
Yes. Disha Central Park is a completed and occupied community of 300+ luxury apartments.

faqs.q: What is the RERA registration number?
faqs.a: Disha Central Park is RERA registered under PR/KN/170729/000378.

projects.name: Disha Windsor Gardens
projects.tagline: An eclectic lifestyle by the lake
projects.description: Spread over a sprawling 1.25 acres and serenely placed close to the scenic splendour of Varthur Lake in Bengaluru, Disha Windsor Gardens is surrounded by IT conglomerates on all sides — making walk-to-work and an easy drive to office a pleasant reality. An epitome of an eclectic lifestyle blending natural quiet, urban indulgence and discreet privacy.
highlights: Surrounded by IT hubs — walk-to-work convenience
A measure of natural quiet and urban indulgence

faqs.q: How big is Disha Windsor Gardens?
faqs.a: The development spans a sprawling 1.25 acres placed close to Varthur Lake in Bengaluru.

faqs.q: Is it convenient for IT professionals?
faqs.a: Yes. The site is surrounded by IT conglomerates on all sides, making walk-to-work or a short drive to office a pleasant reality.
Yes, Disha Windsor Gardens is a completed residential community.

projects.name: Disha Park West
projects.tagline: A flagship lifestyle, parallel to the ORR
projects.description: A triumph of contemporary, cutting-edge planning, Disha Park West offers palatial living space and a great ambience adjacent to our prestigious Disha Central Park. Sprawling over 1.5 acres running parallel to the Outer Ring Road, it places IT companies, banks, educational institutions and hospitals just around the corner.
highlights: Adjacent to Disha Central Park, parallel to ORR
All apartments designed as per Vaastu
Engineered hardwood doors & UPVC French windows

faqs.q: What configurations are available at Disha Park West?
faqs.a: The project offers 2 BHK (1,078–1,208 sft), 2.5 BHK (1,356 sft) and 3 BHK (1,350–1,670 sft) apartments across 120 homes.

faqs.q: What is the RERA registration number?
faqs.a: Disha Park West is RERA registered under PR/KN/170729/000387.

faqs.q: Is the apartment Vaastu compliant and A-Khata?
faqs.a: Yes. All apartments are designed as per Vaastu, with a guaranteed Occupancy Certificate and A-Khata.

projects.mapQuery: Disha Park West Panathur Varthur Road Bangalore

testimonials.name: Subha RamaKrishnan
testimonials.quote: It's a beautiful home designed with thoughtfulness. I'm happy about my decision to opt for this.

testimonials.name: Srinivas
testimonials.quote: Very satisfied with the features and the design. Disha delivered exactly what was promised.

testimonials.name: Shiva
testimonials.quote: Found my dream home at last and I'm thrilled. The whole experience exceeded expectations.

testimonials.name: Rahul K.
testimonials.quote: The swimming pool and the Buddha statue bring a real state of peace to everyday living.

testimonials.name: Resident
testimonials.quote: Seventy per cent open space genuinely changes how a home feels. The landscaping is the soul of the community.

news.title: Disha Park West completed and handed over
news.excerpt: Our flagship lifestyle community of 120 Vaastu-designed apartments adjacent to Central Park reaches full occupancy with A-Khata and Occupancy Certificate.

news.title: Disha Central Park welcomes 300+ families
news.excerpt: The 3.55-acre community near Varthur Lake, with 70% open space and architecture by Ambient Associates, is now a thriving residential landmark.

news.title: Rainwater harvesting & STP across our communities
news.excerpt: Every Disha development integrates rainwater harvesting and sewage treatment, reflecting our commitment to responsible, future-ready living.

news.title: Walk-to-work living at Windsor Gardens
news.excerpt: Placed beside Varthur Lake and surrounded by IT hubs, Windsor Gardens redefines convenience for Bengaluru's technology workforce.

leadership.name: Disha Dwellings
leadership.bio: A company beyond the ordinary, Disha Dwellings was founded on the conviction that a builder's name should be a guarantee, not a gamble — creating harmonious homes you can take pride in.

leadership.name: Design Leadership
leadership.bio: Leading design and delivery with an architect's eye, ensuring every Disha address carries the same signature of craft from concept to handover.

leadership.name: Operations
leadership.bio: Bringing precision to execution — overseeing construction, procurement, and the on-time delivery our owners count on across every community.

leadership.name: Customer Experience
leadership.bio: Shaping how Disha tells its story and building a brand that home buyers, NRIs, and institutions trust across Bengaluru and beyond.

coreValues.title: Concept
coreValues.text: Innovative concepts that welcome tomorrow's lifestyle today — thinking ahead so your home streamlines your life.

coreValues.title: Design
coreValues.text: Attention to detail that enhances the uber-luxury experience, from landscaping to the smallest finish.

coreValues.title: Build
coreValues.text: Showcasing the next level of building standards — engineered materials, Vaastu planning, and lasting quality.

coreValues.title: Life
coreValues.text: A life of comfort and convenience in an inspiring ambience, where every community gives more than it takes.

company.name: Disha Dwellings
company.address: Sy. No. 14/15/1 & 15/2, Panathur-Varthur Road, Panathur, Bengaluru 560103
